missed_changes: Newly vocal, sustained anti-degen/anti-casino stance — explicitly attacking memecoins, 100x leverage, yield farming, MEV capture, airdrop farming and speculation as 'the primary force holding the space back' (a tokens_concerned-type view the prediction left empty)

Strong newly-foregrounded emphasis on modularity vs. monolithic architecture and the open-source modular tech stack as a central thesis (UNIX philosophy, 'modularity paradox', authored a16z 'rise of the modular tech stack')
New focus on restaking / cryptoeconomic security (led EigenLayer Series B) and shared-sequencing interoperability (led Espresso Series B) as concrete frontier categories
notes: Overwhelmingly confirmed at the stance level. Excited sectors map cleanly onto window activity: AI×crypto and modular tech stack authored directly by Ali in a16z's Dec 2023 big-ideas list; ZK proving networks, AI×crypto, decentralized media subgraphs in his year-end portfolio graph; LayerZero v2 praise and Espresso Series B confirm interoperability + trust-minimized bridge concern; EigenLayer/Espresso confirm Ethereum L2/rollup conviction; Nov-Dec safetyism/'bureaucrats in DC' posts confirm regulatory-hostility concern; continued aggressive deal-leading confirms risk-on through-cycle posture. DePIN and wallet-UX marked absent because they appear only in an exhaustive solicitation list / in colleagues' (Eddy Lazzarin's) writing, not as Ali's own expressed stance. The biggest unanticipated development is Ali's loud, repeated condemnation of speculative 'casino' tokens — a concern stance the prediction explicitly declined to take.
